info.title: GitHub REST API
info.description: The GitHub REST API allows developers to create integrations, retrieve data, and automate workflows on the GitHub platform. It provides access to various functionalities, enabling interaction with repositories, issues, pull requests, and user accounts among others.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Endpoints for managing users and user data

tags.name: Rate Limit
tags.description: Endpoints for checking rate limit status

get.description: Returns information about the authenticated user
Returns public information about a specific user

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The handle for the GitHub user account

get.description: Lists public repositories for the specified user

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The handle for the GitHub user account

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Limit results to repositories of the specified type

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The property to sort the results by

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The order to sort by

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch

get.description: Returns information about a specific repository
List issues in a repository. Only open issues will be listed by default.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Indicates the state of the issues to return

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: A list of comma separated label names

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: What to sort results by

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction to sort the results by

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch

post.description: Create a new issue in a repository

assignees.description: Logins for Users to assign to this issue

labels.description: Labels to associate with this issue

milestone.description: The number of the milestone to associate this issue with

parameters.name: issue_number
parameters.description: The number that identifies the issue

parameters.name: issue_number
parameters.description: The number that identifies the issue

assignees.description: Logins for Users to assign to this issue

labels.description: Labels to associate with this issue

parameters.description: Either open, closed, or all to filter by state

parameters.description: What to sort results by

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page

parameters.name: page

title.description: The title of the pull request

body.description: The contents of the pull request

head.description: The name of the branch where your changes are implemented

base.description: The name of the branch you want the changes pulled into

draft.description: Indicates whether the pull request is a draft

get.description: Get details about a specific pull request

parameters.name: pull_number
parameters.description: The number that identifies the pull request

parameters.name: type

get.summary: List gists for the authenticated user
get.description: List the authenticated user's gists or if called anonymously, this endpoint returns all public gists

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch

post.description: Create a new gist for the authenticated user

files.description: Names and content for the files that make up the gist

get.summary: List notifications for the authenticated user
get.description: List all notifications for the current user, sorted by most recently updated

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: If true, show notifications marked as read

parameters.name: participating
parameters.description: If true, only shows notifications in which the user is directly participating or mentioned

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The query contains one or more search keywords and qualifiers

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorts the results of your query

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Determines whether the first search result returned is the highest or lowest number of matches

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch

get.description: Get the current rate limit status for the authenticated user

BearerAuth.description: Personal access token or OAuth token

owner.name: owner
owner.description: The account owner of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

repo.name: repo
repo.description: The name of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image

limit.description: The maximum number of requests you're permitted to make per hour

remaining.description: The number of requests remaining in the current rate limit window

reset.description: The time at which the current rate limit window resets in UTC epoch seconds

used.description: The number of requests you've made in the current rate limit window

documentation_url.description: URL to documentation about this error
